summary: Bryan Cantrill announces an upcoming online Expert Exchange chat session about DTrace, featuring himself and fellow DTrace creators Adam Leventhal and Mike Shapiro. The brief post invites readers to participate and get their questions answered directly by the people who wrote the code.
key_points: DTrace Expert Exchange scheduled for Wednesday at 10am Pacific
Features all three DTrace creators: Cantrill, Leventhal, and Shapiro
Direct Q&A opportunity with the actual code authors
money_quotes: This is your opportunity to have your questions answered on-line by the people who wrote the code. (Which is to say, us.)
key_insight: The DTrace team valued direct engagement with their user community, offering real-time access to the creators themselves.
